meaning: Integrated Services Digital Network,综合业务数字网
examples: ISDN connectivity allows computers to communicate over a network.
Not enough ISDN channels are available to make the call.
Like ISDN, ADSL will use normal qualified copper phone lines.
Right now the company relies on dial-up ISDN and 56K bps modems for most of its Internet access.
Not only were computer dial-up offerings delayed, but higher speed ISDN and DSL services went almost entirely to competitors.
